# Option scoring

## What it does for you

When you ask for the best options, the product ranks them for you and shows the
strongest choice first, so you do not have to compare every option by hand.

## How it works

The scoring follows the approach recorded in [decision.scoring-approach](../decisions/scoring-approach.md): each
option gets a numeric score and the list is sorted highest first.
